reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 6 (Scope Check) triggered. The finding is factually correct — MaxBlobsPerBlock (config/params/config.go:719-723) returns epoch-dependent fallback (6 for Deneb, 9 for Electra) when no BlobSchedule match, violating Fulu spec's requirement to unconditionally return Electra defaults (ELECTRA_FORK_EPOCH, MAX_BLOBS_ELECTRA). However, this is a forward-looking Fulu implementation bug that only manifests after Fulu activation (currently FuluForkEpoch=MaxUint64). Phase 03 explicitly notes 'no immediate consensus risk, but must be fixed before Fulu fork.' Per BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json conditional_scope.future_upgrades, items scheduled for future upgrades are out of scope. This audit targets Fusaka hardfork; Fulu is the subsequent upgrade. 01e reference: outputs/01e_PARTIAL_W0B1_1771748647.json:449-464 — 'get_blob_parameters must return Electra defaults when no BLOB_SCHEDULE entry matches.'
reviewed_items.spec_reference: get_blob_parameters must return Electra defaults when no BLOB_SCHEDULE entry matches. Assertion: forall epoch e where no schedule match: get_blob_parameters(e)==BlobParameters(ELECTRA_FORK_EPOCH, MAX_BLOBS_ELECTRA)
